title: bidens frondosa
intro: Bidens frondosa, also known as bur marigold or beggar's ticks, is a flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Bidens frondosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Bidens frondosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its herbal preparations are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
